'''âl-n-h''' ('''lanaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:character|character]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:character|character]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-n-h
|-
! Lemma
| lanaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lanahithi|lanahithi]] || [[word:lanahiji|lanahiji]] || [[word:lanahishi|lanahishi]] || [[word:lanahi|lanahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanahuthuth|lanahuthuth]] || [[word:lanahujuj|lanahujuj]] || [[word:lanahushush|lanahushush]] || [[word:lanah|lanah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanahuthu|lanahuthu]] || [[word:lanahuju|lanahuju]] || [[word:lanahushu|lanahushu]] || [[word:lanahu|lanahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanahufuth|lanahufuth]] || [[word:lanahufuj|lanahufuj]] || [[word:lanahufush|lanahufush]] || [[word:lanahuf|lanahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lanahethe|lanahethe]] || [[word:lanaheje|lanaheje]] || [[word:lanaheshe|lanaheshe]] || [[word:lanahe|lanahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanahothoth|lanahothoth]] || [[word:lanahojoj|lanahojoj]] || [[word:lanahoshosh|lanahoshosh]] || [[word:lanah|lanah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanahotho|lanahotho]] || [[word:lanahojo|lanahojo]] || [[word:lanahosho|lanahosho]] || [[word:lanaho|lanaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanahofoth|lanahofoth]] || [[word:lanahofoj|lanahofoj]] || [[word:lanahofosh|lanahofosh]] || [[word:lanahof|lanahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lanahĂŠthĂŠ|lanahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lanahĂŠjĂŠ|lanahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lanahĂŠshĂŠ|lanahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lanahĂŠ|lanahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanahathath|lanahathath]] || [[word:lanahajaj|lanahajaj]] || [[word:lanahashash|lanahashash]] || [[word:lanah|lanah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanahatha|lanahatha]] || [[word:lanahaja|lanahaja]] || [[word:lanahasha|lanahasha]] || [[word:lanaha|lanaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanahafath|lanahafath]] || [[word:lanahafaj|lanahafaj]] || [[word:lanahafash|lanahafash]] || [[word:lanahaf|lanahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lanahasha|lanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golanahasha|golanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilanahasha|gokilanahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lanahnĂŒsha|lanahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golanahnknĂŒsha|golanahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilanahnĂŒsha|gokilanahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lanahshĂ«sha|lanahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golanahnkshĂ«sha|golanahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilanahshĂ«sha|gokilanahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lanahrosha|lanahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golanahnkrosha|golanahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilanahrosha|gokilanahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lanahmusha|lanahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golanahnkmusha|golanahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanahmusha|gokilanahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lanahsherasha|lanahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golanahnksherasha|golanahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilanahsherasha|gokilanahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lanahngasha|lanahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golanahnkngasha|golanahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilanahngasha|gokilanahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lanahyasha|lanahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golanahnkyasha|golanahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilanahyasha|gokilanahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lanahyamasha|lanahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golanahnkyamasha|golanahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilanahyamasha|gokilanahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lanahnĂŒshĂ«sha|lanahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golanahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golanahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilanahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilanahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lanahnĂŒrosha|lanahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golanahnknĂŒrosha|golanahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilanahnĂŒrosha|gokilanahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanahnĂŒmusha|lanahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golanahnknĂŒmusha|golanahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanahnĂŒmusha|gokilanahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lanahshĂ«nĂŒsha|lanahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golanahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golanahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilanahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilanahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lanahshĂ«rosha|lanahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golanahnkshĂ«rosha|golanahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilanahshĂ«rosha|gokilanahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanahshĂ«musha|lanahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golanahnkshĂ«musha|golanahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanahshĂ«musha|gokilanahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lanahronĂŒsha|lanahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golanahnkronĂŒsha|golanahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilanahronĂŒsha|gokilanahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lanahroshĂ«sha|lanahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golanahnkroshĂ«sha|golanahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilanahroshĂ«sha|gokilanahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanahromusha|lanahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golanahnkromusha|golanahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanahromusha|gokilanahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lanahmunĂŒsha|lanahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golanahnkmunĂŒsha|golanahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilanahmunĂŒsha|gokilanahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lanahmushĂ«sha|lanahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golanahnkmushĂ«sha|golanahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilanahmushĂ«sha|gokilanahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lanahmurosha|lanahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golanahnkmurosha|golanahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilanahmurosha|gokilanahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lanah|lanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠh|lĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holanah|holanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠnĂŠh|holĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholanah|hoholanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠnĂŠh|hoholĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlanah|nĂŒlanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒlĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlanah|nĂŒnĂŒlanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlanah|nĂŻlanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻlĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlanah|nĂŻnĂŻlanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠnĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulanah|lulanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠnĂŠh|lulĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululanah|lululanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠnĂŠh|lululĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilanah|lilanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠnĂŠh|lilĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililanah|lililanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠnĂŠh|lililĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolanah|kolanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠnĂŠh|kolĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolanah|kokolanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠnĂŠh|kokolĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelanah|kelanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠnĂŠh|kelĂŠnĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelanah|kekelanah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠnĂŠh|kekelĂŠnĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
